topics.summary: The ruling Democratic Party introduced a 'fabricated prosecution' special counsel bill on April 30 that critics say would allow the special prosecutor to drop charges against President Lee Jae-myung across 12 cases, prompting opposition PPP and Reform Party metro candidates to launch joint statements and a public petition drive calling it a 'self-acquittal' law. The controversy has become the dominant flashpoint of the June 3 local election campaign.

evidence_headlines.title: '李 공소 취소 논란' 선거판 강타 … 국민의힘·개혁신당, 공동 전선 구축
'檢 조작기소' 특검에 공소취소 포함…삼권분립 훼손 논란
'李대통령 공소취소' 지선판 흔든다… 최대 쟁점 부상

topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Full Campaign Launch
topics.summary: With one month remaining until the June 3 nationwide local elections, all 16 metropolitan governor and mayor races are now set, with the key battlegrounds being Seoul (Oh Se-hoon vs. Jeong Won-o), Incheon, and Gyeonggi Province (Choo Mi-ae vs. Yang Hyang-ja). Coverage is dominated by candidate matchups, polling, and the ruling party's large structural advantage.

evidence_headlines.title: 6·3지방선거 대진표 확정…여야, 16개 광역단체장 '30일 열전' 돌입
국민의힘 '현역' vs 민주당 '신인'… 新舊 격돌 [6·3 지방선거]
다양한 지방선거 기사를 만나보세요

topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Vote Imminent in National Assembly
topics.summary: A constitutional amendment bill backed by six parties excluding the PPP is scheduled for a National Assembly floor vote on May 7, requiring 12 PPP defectors to reach the two-thirds threshold; the PPP has adopted official opposition and a boycott posture, making passage uncertain. The bill includes stricter martial-law provisions, enshrining the May 18 spirit, and a presidential four-year renewable term, with a simultaneous referendum sought on June 3.

evidence_headlines.title: 개헌안 7일 본회의 표결… '윤석열 방지법' vs '독재적 발상' 대치
개헌 본회의 D-3…국힘 표결 참석 여부 촉각
Six Opposition Parties to Propose Constitutional Amendment on June 6; Securing 10 PPP Votes Key

topics.topic_en: PPP Leader Jang Dong-hyeok Resignation Pressure
topics.summary: PPP leader Jang Dong-hyeok faces mounting internal calls to resign ahead of the June 3 elections, with the party's approval rating hitting a post-2025 low near 15–21% amid chaotic candidate nomination disputes and the failed 'de-Yoon' strategy. Senior figures including Oh Se-hoon and Bae Hyun-jin have set May 14 as a de facto deadline, while Jang has refused to step down.

evidence_headlines.title: 장동혁 사퇴론 확산, 버티는 張…지방선거 코앞 혼돈의 국힘
[정치] 지방선거 앞 '장동혁 사퇴론'...혼란의 국민의힘
커지는 장동혁 사퇴론…오세훈 '결단이 필요한 시점'

topics.topic_en: Yoon Seok-yeol Insurrection Trial Verdict Approaching
topics.summary: A court has announced May 28 as the sentencing date for former President Yoon Seok-yeol's primary insurrection trial; Yoon separately received a seven-year sentence in late April for obstruction of his own arrest, upgraded from five years on appeal. Multiple related trials and special-counsel investigations continue in parallel.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 내란 재판/전개 – 선고기일 2026년 5월 28일
2026년 5월 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 결과·형량·판단 근거 3가지
장동혁은 억울하다?!

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Government Approval Ratings Stable
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating has held above 60% for five consecutive weeks, peaking at 65.5% in the latest Realmeter survey, buoyed by energy security measures and stock market stabilisation; the Democratic Party leads at around 46–50% party support versus the PPP's 21–31%.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
이 대통령 지지율 5주 연속 60%대‥민주 50.6%·국민의힘 30.0%
이재명 대통령 지지율, 64%‥민주당 46%·국민의힘 21%

topics.topic_en: North Korea Reveals Hwasong-20 ICBM Amid Kim China Visit
topics.summary: North Korean state media revealed that Kim Jong Un inspected a facility producing the next-generation Hwasong-20 ICBM immediately before departing for China, with analysts citing Russian technical assistance and a bid to assert leverage ahead of upcoming US-China summitry. The disclosure has renewed South Korean and allied concerns about Pyongyang's escalating nuclear missile programme.

evidence_headlines.title: North Korea announces new Hwasong-20 nuclear missile as Kim arrives in China
Kim Jong Un's New Hwasong-20 ICBM May Carry Multiple Warheads With Russian Help
북한, 미사일로 흔드는 외교 지렛대

topics.topic_en: US Tariff Pressure and Korea Trade Negotiations
topics.summary: Ongoing US tariff pressure, including Trump's threat to raise tariffs on Korean goods to 25% after the National Assembly failed to pass implementing legislation for the 2025 trade deal, remains a key economic-policy issue; the government is distributing high-oil-price relief payments to cushion domestic inflation driven partly by the Middle East conflict and the weaker won.

evidence_headlines.title: 트럼프 2기 관세정책, 한국 정부가 고려해야 할 점들
2026년 5월 4일 오늘의 주요 뉴스(트럼프발 국제 정세 격변과 국내 물가·경제 동향)
2025년 세계 무역 전쟁/대한민국

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
